scenario.summary: November month-end intercompany reconciliation — 148 transactions across 6 entities
scenario.situation: It's the last week of November. The Intercompany Accountant needs to reconcile all intercompany transactions for the month-end close. There are 148 transactions across the 6 APAC entities — including raw material transfers from Shanghai to Penang, management fee allocations from Singapore HQ to all subsidiaries, contract manufacturing charges from Rayong, and shared services billings. Transfer pricing documentation needs to be verified for arm's-length compliance. Once reconciled, elimination entries must be generated for the consolidated trial balance before Financial Reporting can produce the group financials.
dataInputs: Transfer pricing policies and arm's-length documentation
FX rates for multi-currency settlements (SGD, MYR, CNY, THB)
agentSteps: Ingests 148 intercompany transactions and auto-matches by counterparty, amount, and reference — 131 transactions (89%) match cleanly
Identifies 17 unmatched items: 7 timing differences (booked in different periods), 5 FX rounding variances, 3 amount mismatches, 2 missing counterparty entries
Resolves timing differences: 5 of 7 are within 3-day tolerance and auto-cleared, 2 require journal entries to align periods
Calculates FX impact on intercompany balances: S$1.8M net exposure from CNY/SGD and THB/SGD movements — generates FX adjustment entries

Validates transfer pricing: flags 3 transactions where markup falls outside arm's-length range (raw materials Shanghai→Penang, contract manufacturing Rayong→Singapore, shared services Singapore→Shenzhen)
Generates elimination entries: 74 elimination JEs totaling S$89M in intercompany revenue/expense and S$52M in intercompany receivables/payables
Produces reconciliation report: matched vs. unmatched summary, aging of open items, FX impact analysis, and transfer pricing exception report for Tax & Compliance review
scenario.expectedOutput: Complete intercompany reconciliation: 131 auto-matched (89%), 17 exceptions resolved or routed, 74 elimination entries for consolidated trial balance, FX adjustment entries (S$1.8M), and transfer pricing exception report
